<!-- generated by `make bench-docs` (scripts/bench_report.py --static); regenerate on a representative machine, don't hand-edit -->
# Benchmarks

Measured on **AMD Ryzen AI 9 465 w/ Radeon 880M**, Python 3.12.13, 2026-06-10. Throughput is **MSa/s** (higher is better); other ops are mean **time per call** (lower is better). These are representative single-machine numbers — *not* the shared CI runner (whose absolute values aren't hardware-representative). Regenerate with `make bench && make bench-docs`.

## Python (pytest-benchmark)

| benchmark | throughput |
| --- | ---: |
